results.command:
bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail
BIN=/data/tmp/frankenredis-coralox-pass163-candidate-target/release/frankenredis
BENCH=/data/projects/.scratch/frankenredis-coralox-pass163-20260613T080935Z/legacy_redis_code/redis/src/redis-benchmark
PORT=24782
"$BIN" --port "$PORT" >/tmp/fr_pass163_candidate_rpush_server.log 2>&1 &
pid=$!
trap "kill $pid 2>/dev/null || true; wait $pid 2>/dev/null || true" EXIT
for _ in $(seq 1 100); do
  if "$BENCH" -p "$PORT" -t ping -n 1 -q >/tmp/fr_pass163_candidate_ping.log 2>&1; then
    break
  fi
  sleep 0.03
done
"$BENCH" -p "$PORT" -t rpush -n 1000000 -c 50 -P 16 -r 100000 -q >/tmp/fr_pass163_candidate_rpush_bench.log
'
